title: Crio Mod
description:
A mod about my friend, Crio
This mod contains a lot of content
I recommend playing it with other mods
body:
The Crio Mod is based on my friend Crio. It containts quite a bit of content and the list goes as follows (keep in mind everything is Crio Related): new trees, a new ore, 3 new bosses, a dimension, passive mobs, monster mobs, food items, blocks related to the listed things, advancements, paintings and much more.
VERY IMPORTANT TO MAKE THE CRIO PORTAL YOU USE CRIO LOGS FOR THE BLOCKS
